query_title: The Return of the Texas Chainsaw Massacre

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.

recommendations.title: Asylum Blackout
recommendations.overview: A group of cooks at an asylum for the criminally insane get locked in with the inmates during a massive thunderstorm

recommendations.title: The Hills Have Eyes 2
recommendations.overview: A group of National Guard trainees on a routine mission find themselves up against cannibalistic mutants in the New Mexico desert.

recommendations.title: The Legend of La Llorona
recommendations.overview: Based on a famous Mexican legend, a group of kids must stop the ghost of a woman whose guilt over the drowning of her own children leads her to abduct youngsters who wander the woods at night.

recommendations.title: The Forgotten Ones
recommendations.overview: When a devastating boat crash shipwrecks a group of friends in the jungles of an uncharted island, they are savagely picked off one-by-one by a cannibalistic enemy that evolution forgot.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: When the others leave for the night, the last mortician begins to fondle the corpses. He quickly moves to the corpse of a young woman who died in a car crash.

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: Night of the Animated Dead
recommendations.overview: An animated retelling of ‘Night of the Living Dead’, in which a group of people in a rural farmhouse struggle to survive the threat of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: At a high school senior prom, a masked killer stalks four teenagers who were responsible for the accidental death of a classmate six years prior.
